title: polypodium glabellum
intro: Polypodium glabellum, also known as the common polypody or maidenhair fern, is a type of plant belonging to the Polypodiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Polypodium glabellum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an anti-parasitic agent. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and sometimes used in the form of a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties.
